name: Deep Groove Ball Bearing 6205-ZZ
description: Metal-shielded deep groove ball bearing, 25×52×15 mm. Suitable for high-speed applications in electric motors, pumps, and conveyors.

name: Deep Groove Ball Bearing 6205-2RS
description: Rubber-sealed deep groove ball bearing, 25×52×15 mm. Superior dust and moisture protection for harsh environments.

name: Deep Groove Ball Bearing 6304-2RS
description: Rubber-sealed deep groove ball bearing, 20×52×15 mm. Ideal for gearboxes, agricultural equipment, and textile machinery.

name: Deep Groove Ball Bearing 6308-ZZ
description: Metal-shielded deep groove ball bearing, 40×90×23 mm. Heavy-duty option for larger motor and pump shafts.

name: Cylindrical Roller Bearing NU210
description: Cylindrical roller bearing NU210, 50×90×20 mm. High radial load capacity for machine tool spindles and heavy rotating equipment.

name: Spherical Roller Bearing 22212
description: Self-aligning spherical roller bearing, 60×110×28 mm. Handles misalignment and heavy shock loads in crushers and vibrating screens.

name: Angular Contact Ball Bearing 7206
description: Single-row angular contact ball bearing, 30×62×16 mm. Designed for combined radial and axial loads in machine tool spindles.

name: Tapered Roller Bearing 30205
description: Tapered roller bearing, 25×52×16.25 mm. Handles combined radial and thrust loads in wheel hubs and differential gears.

name: V-Ring Seal 25×42 mm
description: Axial rubber V-ring seal for shaft diameters 25–42 mm. Prevents ingress of dirt and moisture on rotating shafts.

name: V-Ring Seal 30×47 mm
description: Axial rubber V-ring seal for shaft diameters 30–47 mm. Standard replacement for conveyor and pump shaft sealing.

name: TC Oil Seal 40×62×8 mm
description: Double-lip TC oil seal, 40×62×8 mm. Retains lubricant and excludes contaminants on gearbox and pump shafts.

name: Hydraulic Piston Seal 50 mm PU
description: Polyurethane piston seal for 50 mm bore hydraulic cylinders. Low-friction design with excellent wear resistance.

name: Metric O-Ring Assortment Kit (419 pc)
description: 419-piece metric NBR O-ring assortment in sizes 3–50 mm ID. Essential workshop spares kit for maintenance teams.

name: Classical V-Belt A1250
description: Classical wrapped V-belt, A section, 1250 mm outer length. General-purpose drive belt for fans, compressors, and light machinery.

name: Gates V-Belt A1250 Hi-Power
description: Premium Hi-Power V-belt, A section, 1250 mm. Enhanced cord construction for longer service life and higher power transmission.

name: Wedge Belt SPB 2500
description: Narrow wedge belt SPB section, 2500 mm. Higher power density for industrial compressors, blowers, and heavy drives.

name: HTD Timing Belt 5M-450-15
description: HTD synchronous timing belt, 5 mm pitch, 450 mm length, 15 mm wide. Precision drive for CNC machines and packaging equipment.

name: Poly-V Belt PJ 1168 (6 ribs)
description: Multi-rib poly-V belt, PJ section, 1168 mm, 6 ribs. Compact drive solution for HVAC fans and office equipment.

name: Hex Bolt M10×30 A2 Stainless (50pk)
description: DIN 933 hex bolt M10×30 mm, A2 stainless steel, pack of 50. Corrosion-resistant fastener for food, marine, and outdoor applications.

name: Hex Bolt M8×25 A2 Stainless (100pk)
description: DIN 933 hex bolt M8×25 mm, A2 stainless steel, pack of 100. High-volume general-purpose fastener.

name: Hex Bolt M12×50 Grade 8.8 (25pk)
description: DIN 931 hex bolt M12×50 mm, grade 8.8 zinc plated, pack of 25. High-tensile fastener for structural and machinery applications.

name: Wedge Lock Washer M16 (50pk)
description: Nord-Lock wedge lock washer pairs for M16 bolts, pack of 50 pairs. Prevents bolt loosening under vibration and dynamic loads.

name: Blind Rivet 4.8×12 Aluminium/Steel (500pk)
description: Open-end blind rivet 4.8×12 mm, aluminium body with steel mandrel, pack of 500. Fast permanent fastening for sheet metal.

name: EP2 Lithium Grease Cartridge 400 g
description: Multi-purpose EP2 lithium grease in a 400 g screw cartridge. For bearings, chassis points, and general lubrication.

name: Hydraulic Oil ISO 46 — 5 L
description: Premium anti-wear hydraulic oil ISO VG 46, 5-litre container. For industrial hydraulic systems, machine tools, and mobile equipment.

name: Chain & Cable Lubricant Spray 500 ml
description: Heavy-duty chain and cable lubricant spray, 500 ml. Penetrates deep into chain links to reduce friction and prevent corrosion.

name: Synthetic Gear Oil ISO 68 — 20 L
description: Fully synthetic industrial gear oil ISO VG 68, 20-litre drum. Extended drain intervals for enclosed gearboxes.

name: Hydraulic Return Filter 10 µm
description: Spin-on hydraulic return line filter, 10 µm rating. Protects valves and pumps by removing contamination from return flow.

name: Compressor Air Intake Filter Element
description: Replacement air intake filter element for rotary screw compressors up to 50 HP. Ensures clean air supply for reliable compression.

name: Oil Filter W940 (Spin-On)
description: Spin-on oil filter for industrial engines and compressors. High dirt-holding capacity with anti-drain valve.

name: Pneumatic Cylinder ISO 6432 32×100
description: Round-body pneumatic cylinder, 32 mm bore, 100 mm stroke. ISO 6432 standard, double-acting with magnetic piston.

name: Pneumatic Cylinder ISO 15552 63×200
description: Profile-body pneumatic cylinder, 63 mm bore, 200 mm stroke. ISO 15552 standard with adjustable cushioning.

name: Push-In Fitting QS 8 mm (10pk)
description: Quick-connect push-in fitting for 8 mm OD tubing, G1/4 thread, pack of 10. Tool-free installation and removal.

name: PU Tubing 8×5.5 mm Blue (50 m)
description: Polyurethane pneumatic tubing, 8 mm OD × 5.5 mm ID, blue, 50-metre coil. Flexible and kink-resistant.

name: 5/2 Solenoid Valve G1/4 24VDC
description: 5/2-way single solenoid valve, G1/4 ports, 24 V DC coil. Standard directional control for pneumatic cylinders.

name: FRL Air Preparation Unit G1/4
description: Combined filter-regulator-lubricator unit, G1/4 ports. Provides clean, regulated, and lubricated air to pneumatic systems.

name: Contactor 9A 4 kW 24VDC Coil
description: 3-pole contactor, 9 A AC3, 4 kW at 400 V, 24 V DC coil. Compact design for motor starting and industrial control.

name: Contactor 25A 11 kW 230VAC Coil
description: 3-pole contactor, 25 A AC3, 11 kW at 400 V, 230 V AC coil. For medium-duty motor control and heating loads.

name: Plug-In Relay 4PDT 6A 24VDC
description: 4-pole double-throw plug-in relay, 6 A contacts, 24 V DC coil. With LED indicator and test button. For PLC interfacing and control circuits.

name: DIN Rail Terminal Block 10 mm² Grey (20pk)
description: Screw-clamp DIN rail terminal block, 10 mm², grey, pack of 20. For control panel wiring up to 10 mm² conductors.

name: MCB C16 1-Pole 6kA
description: Miniature circuit breaker, C-curve, 16 A, 1 pole, 6 kA breaking capacity. DIN rail mounting for panel distribution boards.

name: Variable Frequency Drive 2.2 kW 230V
description: Compact VFD for single-phase 230 V input, 2.2 kW / 3 HP. Speed control for fans, pumps, and conveyors.

name: Cutting Disc 230×2×22.2 mm (10pk)
description: Flat cutting disc for steel and stainless, 230×2×22.2 mm, pack of 10. Fast, clean cuts with low vibration.

name: Cutting Disc 125×1×22.2 mm (25pk)
description: Ultra-thin cutting disc for steel and stainless, 125×1×22.2 mm, pack of 25. Minimal material loss and heat build-up.

name: Grinding Disc 125×6×22.2 mm (10pk)
description: Depressed-centre grinding disc, 125×6×22.2 mm, pack of 10. Aggressive stock removal on steel and cast iron.

name: Flap Disc 125 mm P60 Zirconia
description: Zirconia flap disc, 125 mm, P60 grit. Ideal for weld blending and surface preparation on stainless steel.

name: Flap Disc 125 mm P120 Zirconia
description: Zirconia flap disc, 125 mm, P120 grit. Fine finishing on stainless steel and aluminium surfaces.

name: Cut-Resistant Gloves Level 5 (12 pairs)
description: HPPE cut-resistant gloves with PU palm coating, EN 388 level 5. For handling sheet metal, glass, and sharp components.

name: Nitrile Disposable Gloves Blue (100pk)
description: Powder-free nitrile examination gloves, blue, pack of 100. Chemical-resistant and latex-free for sensitive tasks.

name: Chemical Splash Safety Goggles
description: Indirect-vent chemical splash goggles with anti-fog lens. Conforms to EN 166 B 3 4. For chemical handling and dusty environments.

name: Ear Defenders SNR 31 dB
description: Over-head ear defenders with SNR 31 dB attenuation. Comfortable padded headband for extended wear in noisy workshops.

name: Safety Boot S3 SRC Composite Toe
description: S3 safety boot with composite toecap, penetration-resistant midsole, and SRC slip resistance. Lightweight and metal-free.

name: Industrial Safety Helmet White
description: Vented industrial safety helmet with ratchet adjustment and sweatband. Conforms to EN 397. For construction and factory floor.

name: Pressure Regulator G1/4 0.5–8 bar
description: Precision pneumatic pressure regulator, G1/4 ports, adjustable 0.5–8 bar. With pressure gauge and relieving function.

name: Inductive Proximity Sensor M12 4mm PNP
description: Flush-mount inductive proximity sensor, M12 barrel, 4 mm sensing distance, PNP NO output. For position detection on machine tools.

name: Dust Collector Cartridge Filter 325×660
description: Pleated polyester cartridge filter, 325 mm dia × 660 mm length. Replacement for industrial dust extraction units.

name: Penetrating Oil Spray 400 ml
description: Fast-acting penetrating spray to free seized nuts, bolts, and rusted components. With Smart Straw for precise application.

name: Wedge Anchor M12×120 Zinc (25pk)
description: Through-bolt wedge anchor M12×120 mm, zinc plated, pack of 25. For anchoring equipment and steelwork to concrete.

name: Wire Wheel Brush 125 mm M14
description: Knotted wire wheel brush, 125 mm diameter, M14 thread. For heavy rust and paint removal on angle grinders.

name: Pillow Block Bearing Unit UCP205
description: Cast-iron pillow block bearing unit, 25 mm bore. Pre-lubricated and sealed for conveyor idler rolls and agricultural equipment.

name: Roller Chain 08B-1 (5 m box)
description: BS/ISO 08B-1 simplex roller chain, 5-metre box with connecting link. For low-to-medium speed power transmission drives.

name: DIN Rail Timer Relay 0.1s–100h
description: Multi-function DIN rail timer relay with 10 time functions. Adjustable from 0.1 seconds to 100 hours. 2 changeover contacts.
